metadata.description: Model availability configuration for PyTorch Inference Framework

example.name: example
example.description: Default example model for testing and demonstrations

distilbert_sentiment.name: distilbert_sentiment
distilbert_sentiment.description: Fine-tuned DistilBERT model for sentiment classification

speecht5_tts.name: speecht5_tts
speecht5_tts.description: Microsoft SpeechT5 model for high-quality text-to-speech synthesis

bark_tts.name: bark_tts
bark_tts.description: Suno Bark model for voice cloning and emotional speech synthesis

kokoro_v019.name: kokoro_v019
kokoro_v019.description: Lightweight 82M-parameter multi-voice TTS model based on StyleTTS2 + ISTFTNet

kokoro_v10.name: kokoro_v10
kokoro_v10.description: Improved Kokoro with 54 voices; StyleTTS2 + ISTFTNet architecture

kokoro_onnx.name: kokoro_onnx
kokoro_onnx.description: Kokoro v1.0 exported to ONNX — cross-platform inference without PyTorch

kokoro_onnx_int8.name: kokoro_onnx_int8
kokoro_onnx_int8.description: INT8-quantized Kokoro — ~4x smaller, faster on CPU

xtts_v2.name: xtts_v2
xtts_v2.description: Coqui XTTS v2 — high-quality zero-shot voice cloning via Transformer + HiFiGAN

piper_lessac.name: piper_lessac
piper_lessac.description: Piper VITS-based ONNX TTS — fast, lightweight, runs entirely on CPU

styletts2.name: styletts2
styletts2.description: StyleTTS2 base model for LJSpeech — single-speaker, high naturalness

f5_tts.name: f5_tts
f5_tts.description: Flow Matching DiT TTS — zero-shot voice cloning, non-autoregressive, MIT licensed

parler_tts_mini.name: parler_tts_mini
parler_tts_mini.description: Conditional 0.9B transformer TTS — controllable gender, pace, pitch via natural language prompt

chatterbox.name: chatterbox
chatterbox.description: ResembleAI Chatterbox — emotion exaggeration control, Perth watermarking, 23 languages

outetts_0_3_500m.name: outetts_0_3_500m
outetts_0_3_500m.description: Qwen2.5-0.5B-based TTS with voice cloning; 6 languages; GGUF quantizations available

sesame_csm_1b.name: sesame_csm_1b
sesame_csm_1b.description: SOTA contextual/conversational speech — Llama backbone + RVQ audio decoder, MOS 4.7

cosyvoice2_0_5b.name: cosyvoice2_0_5b
cosyvoice2_0_5b.description: LLM-based TTS with SOTA content consistency; 9 languages + 18 Chinese dialects

index_tts_2.name: index_tts_2
index_tts_2.description: 2025 SOTA zero-shot controllable TTS — detailed expressiveness control

melotts_english_v3.name: melotts_english_v3
melotts_english_v3.description: Fast real-time CPU inference; multiple English accents (US, UK, Indian, Australian)

bark_small.name: bark_small
bark_small.description: Smaller/faster Bark — same capabilities as full Bark, lower quality, 1.5 GB

matcha_tts.name: matcha_tts
matcha_tts.description: Fast ODE-based synthesis via conditional flow matching; ONNX-exportable; LJSpeech quality

vits_vctk.name: vits_vctk
vits_vctk.description: Multi-speaker VCTK VITS model — 109 speakers, fast real-time synthesis

amphion_maskgct.name: amphion_maskgct
amphion_maskgct.description: Masked Generative Codec Transformer — zero-shot voice cloning, non-autoregressive

metavoice.name: metavoice
metavoice.description: MetaVoice-1B — 1B parameter voice cloning model from MetaVoice

openvoice.name: openvoice
openvoice.description: MyShell OpenVoice — flexible voice style control with VITS backbone

fish_speech_v15.name: fish_speech_v15
fish_speech_v15.description: VQGAN + Llama TTS — multi-lingual, high quality, ~1GB

resnet50.name: resnet50
resnet50.description: 50-layer residual network — strong baseline for image classification

resnet101.name: resnet101
resnet101.description: 101-layer residual network — high accuracy image classification

resnet152.name: resnet152
resnet152.description: 152-layer residual network — highest accuracy in standard ResNet family

mobilenet_v3_small.name: mobilenet_v3_small
mobilenet_v3_small.description: Ultra-lightweight MobileNetV3 small — optimized for edge/mobile CPU inference

mobilenet_v3_large.name: mobilenet_v3_large
mobilenet_v3_large.description: MobileNetV3 large variant — better accuracy than V2 with similar efficiency

eva02_large.name: eva02_large
eva02_large.description: SOTA ImageNet-1K accuracy at 90.054% Top-1; MIM pretraining

eva_giant.name: eva_giant
eva_giant.description: Very large EVA ViT — 4 GB, 89.792% Top-1 on ImageNet-1K

convnextv2_huge.name: convnextv2_huge
convnextv2_huge.description: SOTA ConvNet — 88.848% Top-1 with FCMAE pretraining + 512px fine-tuning

convnext_xxlarge_clip.name: convnext_xxlarge_clip
convnext_xxlarge_clip.description: CLIP LAION-2B pretrained ConvNeXt XXLarge with model soup fine-tuning — 88.612% Top-1

maxvit_xlarge.name: maxvit_xlarge
maxvit_xlarge.description: MaxViT hybrid architecture — 88.53% Top-1 at 512px, ImageNet-21K pretrained

beit_large.name: beit_large
beit_large.description: BERT-style pretraining for vision — 88.6% Top-1 at 512px

swin_large.name: swin_large
swin_large.description: Hierarchical Swin Transformer — 87.3% Top-1 at 384px, ImageNet-22K pretrained

deit3_huge.name: deit3_huge
deit3_huge.description: Data-efficient image transformer v3 — 87.7% Top-1 at 224px

vit_giant_clip.name: vit_giant_clip
vit_giant_clip.description: Google ViT Giant pretrained on CLIP LAION-2B — ~88.5% Top-1

coatnet_3.name: coatnet_3
coatnet_3.description: Efficient Conv + Attention hybrid — ~86.0% Top-1 at 224px

efficientnetv2_xl.name: efficientnetv2_xl
efficientnetv2_xl.description: EfficientNetV2 XL — 87.3% Top-1 with ImageNet-21K pretraining

mobilenetv4_hybrid_large.name: mobilenetv4_hybrid_large
mobilenetv4_hybrid_large.description: Edge-optimized MobileNetV4 — 84.36% Top-1 at 448px, CPU/mobile friendly

vit_base.name: vit_base
vit_base.description: Vision Transformer model for image classification

bert_base_uncased.name: bert_base_uncased
bert_base_uncased.description: Google BERT base — general-purpose transformer for text classification and NLU

roberta_base.name: roberta_base
roberta_base.description: Robustly optimized BERT pretraining — stronger text classification than BERT base

bart_large_mnli.name: bart_large_mnli
bart_large_mnli.description: facebook/bart-large-mnli — zero-shot text classification via NLI

whisper_base.name: whisper_base
whisper_base.description: OpenAI Whisper base model for speech recognition

whisper_small.description: OpenAI Whisper small — 244 MB, 39M parameters, multilingual

whisper_medium.description: OpenAI Whisper medium — 769 MB, 307M parameters, multilingual

whisper_large.name: whisper_large
whisper_large.description: OpenAI Whisper large — 1.5 GB, multilingual, highest base accuracy

whisper_large_v3.name: whisper_large_v3
whisper_large_v3.description: OpenAI Whisper large-v3 — best accuracy, improved multilingual

whisper_turbo.name: whisper_turbo
whisper_turbo.description: OpenAI Whisper turbo — 809 MB, fast large-v3 distillation
